title: Improving mathematical reasoning with process supervision
titleZh: 通过过程监督改进数学推理
summary: We've trained a model to achieve a new state-of-the-art in mathematical problem solving by rewarding each correct step of reasoning (“process supervision”) instead of simply rewarding the correct final answer (“outcome supervision”). title: Democratic inputs to AI
titleZh: 对人工智能的民主投入
summary: Our nonprofit organization, OpenAI, Inc., is launching a program to award ten $100,000 grants to fund experiments in setting up a democratic process for deciding what rules AI systems should follow, within the bounds defined by the law.
summaryZh: 我们的非营利组织OpenAI, Inc.正在启动一项计划，在法律规定的范围内，提供10 $ 100,000的赠款，用于资助建立民主程序的实验，以决定人工智能系统应遵循的规则。
highlights: Our nonprofit organization, OpenAI, Inc., is launching a program to award ten $100,000 grants to fund experiments in setting up a democratic process for deciding what rules AI syst

title: Governance of superintelligence
summary: Now is a good time to start thinking about the governance of superintelligence—future AI systems dramatically more capable than even AGI.
summaryZh: 现在是开始思考超级智能治理的好时机--未来的人工智能系统甚至比AGI更强大。
highlights: Now is a good time to start thinking about the governance of superintelligence—future AI systems dramatically more capable than even AGI.
highlightsZh: 现在是开始思考超级智能治理的好时机--未来的人工智能系统甚至比AGI更强大。

title: Introducing the ChatGPT app for iOS
titleZh: 推出适用于iOS的ChatGPT应用程序
summary: The ChatGPT app syncs your conversations, supports voice input, and brings our latest model improvements to your fingertips.
summaryZh: ChatGPT应用程序可以同步您的对话，支持语音输入，并将我们最新的模型改进带到您的指尖。
highlights: The ChatGPT app syncs your conversations, supports voice input, and brings our latest model improvements to your fingertips.
highlightsZh: ChatGPT应用程序可以同步您的对话，支持语音输入，并将我们最新的模型改进带到您的指尖。

title: Language models can explain neurons in language models
titleZh: 语言模型可以解释语言模型中的神经元
summary: We use GPT-4 to automatically write explanations for the behavior of neurons in large language models and to score those explanations. We release a dataset of these (imperfect) explanations and scores for every neuron in GPT-2.
summaryZh: 我们使用GPT-4自动编写大型语言模型中神经元行为的解释，并对这些解释进行评分。我们发布了GPT-2中每个神经元的这些（不完美）解释和分数的数据集。
highlights: We use GPT-4 to automatically write explanations for the behavior of neurons in large language models and to score those explanations.
We release a dataset of these (imperfect) explanations and scores for every neuron in GPT-2.
highlightsZh: 我们使用GPT-4自动编写大型语言模型中神经元行为的解释，并对这些解释进行评分。我们发布了GPT-2中每个神经元的这些（不完美）解释和分数的数据集。
